headline: Amex GBT’s 12-Year Ownership Saga — Who Won and Lost
summary: A $6.3 billion take-private closes the books on one of the most convoluted cap tables in travel. The scorecard is not what you’d expect.

headline: Long Lake Agrees to Acquire American Express Global Business Travel, the World’s Largest Corporate Travel Platform, for $6.3 Billion, With Support From General Catalyst and Alpha Wave
summary: NEW YORK, May 04, 2026--Long Lake agrees to acquire American Express Global Business Travel
